payload.answer: SELECT statements are allowed in this mode; DELETE statements are denied.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution needed for a SQL mode policy statement.

details: Policy parsed as read-only SQL mode.

repair_options: If a write is needed, switch out of select-only mode before issuing DELETE or other modifying SQL.
